title: Upwork Client Acquisition Pipeline
short_summary: End-to-end freelance job acquisition pipeline using Google Sheets, Apps Script, GPT-4o-mini, and BigQuery SQL
summary: An automated end-to-end data pipeline tracking freelance client acquisition on Upwork. Google Sheets serves as the live operational database, with Apps Script managing session tracking, job discovery logging, duplicate detection, AI-powered bid recommendations via GPT-4o-mini, and keyword mining. Structured data is exported to BigQuery for SQL-based analysis across 8 analytical queries covering funnel performance, keyword intelligence, and proposal analytics.

components.name: Google Sheets Data Layer
components.objective: Maintain a structured Google Sheets database for live job discovery, scoring, proposal tracking, session logging, and keyword intelligence.
components.business_value: Creates a real-time, structured operational record of all acquisition activity that feeds downstream analysis without requiring a formal database.

components.name: Apps Script Automation Layer
components.objective: Automate session management, duplicate detection, job scoring, AI proposal generation, and keyword mining using Google Apps Script and GPT-4o-mini.
components.business_value: Reduces manual overhead in the acquisition workflow and improves consistency of bid quality through AI-assisted proposal generation.

components.name: BigQuery SQL Analysis Layer
components.objective: Execute 8 BigQuery SQL queries covering funnel analysis, keyword performance, tool market share, score distribution, session performance, proposal analysis, keyword intelligence, and job complexity.
components.business_value: Transforms raw acquisition activity into structured insights that guide job targeting, proposal strategy, and resource allocation.
